description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: From the site's JRPG recommendations, add 3 Nintendo Switch review articles with main story length of 40 hours or less and a rating of at least 4 stars to your reading list.

target_names: Chrono Trigger Review – Timeless Time Travel
Octopath Traveler II Review – Eight Roads, One Journey
Final Fantasy VI Review – Opera of the End

tasks.instruction: Find a 2024 beginner guide for a JRPG and, among those, choose the article with the highest helpfulness rating (using at least 4.5/5 if available) and submit a brief comment as a new player mentioning one specific helpful section.

target_names: Persona 5 Royal Beginner Guide 2024 – Optimal Royal Path

tasks.instruction: Compare PS5 and PC review articles for the same JRPG, then add the version with the higher numeric review score to your wishlist, choosing the PS5 version if the scores are equal.

target_names: Tales of Arise Review (PS5) – Breaking the Chains

tasks.instruction: In the News section, follow 2 PC JRPG news articles about 2025 releases that are tagged with “Release Date.”

target_names: Astral Odyssey: Echoes of the Rift Gets PC Release Date for 2025
Chronicles of the Azure Sigil Targets 2025 PC Launch

tasks.instruction: Create a new collection and add 4 feature articles over 3000 words that are tagged with story-related topics and have ratings of at least 4 stars.

target_names: Stealing Hearts: A Deep Dive into Persona 5 Royal’s Palace Stories
No Future but Now: Narrative Themes in Xenoblade Chronicles 3
Paths of Conviction: Writing Branching Routes in Triangle Strategy
Why Chrono Trigger’s Story Still Works Decades Later

tasks.instruction: Sign up for the JRPG newsletter by entering an email, selecting turn-based and tactics as favorite genres, choosing PS5 and Nintendo Switch as preferred platforms, setting email frequency to weekly, and adding a short note that you want recommendations and guides for those genres on those platforms.

tasks.instruction: Use the Game Finder tool to search for a turn-based JRPG on Xbox Series X between 20–60 hours on normal difficulty released between 2018 and 2024, then open the top recommendation and rate its article 5 stars.

target_names: Game Finder Pick: Yakuza: Like a Dragon (Xbox Series X)

tasks.instruction: In the Guides section, bookmark 3 PS5 trophy or achievement guides for JRPGs released after 2020 that estimate completion under 80 hours and are labeled Hard difficulty.

target_names: Star Ocean: The Divine Force – PS5 Trophy Roadmap
Tales of Arise – PS5 Trophy Guide and 100% Completion Tips
Octopath Traveler II – PS5 Trophy & Achievement Guide

tasks.instruction: From a Top 10 list of classic JRPGs published before 2020, open review articles for 2 games released before 2005 and add both of those games to your wishlist.

target_names: Chrono Trigger Review – Timeless Time Travel
